sources.title: The Grand Duel classic western
sources.description: Outlaws bent on avenging their leader's death come face to face with a mysterious veteran gunslinger.

metadata.Plot: Philipp Wermeer has been framed for the murder of a powerful figure known as The Patriarch. Wermeer escapes, but the three Saxon brothers, sons of The Patriarch, have arranged for a large bounty on Wermeer's head. Clayton is a grizzled ex-sheriff stripped of his office in Jefferson after refusing to acknowledge Wermeer's guilt. During a series of fire-fights, Clayton contrives to help Wermeer escape from attacks of bounty-hunters. Together, the two make their way to Jefferson, where they can confront the three powerful Saxon brothers, and reveal the surprising truth about who killed The Patriarch.
metadata.Actors: Lee Van Cleef, Alberto Dentice, Jess Hahn
